ciffc.note: Off-season. National fire statistics will be updated when the 2026 fire season begins.

news.title: Wildfire funding in Sask. budget disappointing, says northern emergency co-ordinator
news.description: Saskatchewan's 2026-27 budget includes a modest wildfire funding increase that emergency co-ordinators say falls short of what's needed.

news.title: B.C. was unprepared to help Lytton rebuild after wildfire, A-G report says
news.description: A new audit finds provincial funding oversight gaps hampered Lytton's recovery after the 2021 wildfire destroyed the town.

news.title: What's the wildfire risk in Nova Scotia this year?
news.description: Environment Canada is predicting above-normal wildfire risk for Nova Scotia heading into the 2026 fire season.

news.title: Nova Scotia's wildfire woods ban being tested in court
news.description: A legal challenge is underway against Nova Scotia's provincial ban on open burning in forested areas.

news.title: Province preparing for 2026 wildfire season as Environment Canada predicts above-normal risk
news.description: Provincial wildfire crews are ramping up ahead of a potentially active 2026 fire season across Western Canada.
